description: Encryption of data in transit between systems and to/from users. TLS configuration, certificate management, HTTPS enforcement.

subcriteria.name: tls_configuration
subcriteria.reference_text: TLS 1.2 or 1.3 configured and enforced on all external endpoints. Load balancer or server configuration showing minimum TLS version.

subcriteria.name: certificate_management
subcriteria.reference_text: Certificate management process. Certificate authority, renewal process, auto-renewal configuration, monitoring for expiration.

subcriteria.name: https_enforcement
subcriteria.reference_text: HTTPS enforced for all web traffic. HTTP redirects to HTTPS. HSTS header configured.

subcriteria.name: cipher_suites
subcriteria.reference_text: Cipher suite configuration. Weak ciphers disabled. TLS 1.0 and 1.1 disabled. Strong cipher suites only.

mismatch_signals.reason: Document describes encryption-at-rest (database/storage). CC6.7 requires evidence of encryption IN TRANSIT (TLS/HTTPS).
Screenshot of browser padlock proves nothing about TLS configuration quality.
Device/disk encryption is not encryption-in-transit. Wrong type of encryption for CC6.7.
